title: User-Agent Parser
description: Paste a User-Agent string to parse the browser, rendering engine, operating system, device type and bot info.

localOnly.title: Fully local
localOnly.description: All parsing runs locally in your browser. Nothing is uploaded.

empty.title: Waiting for input
empty.description: Paste a User-Agent, or click "Use current browser UA" to start parsing.

unrecognized.title: Not recognized
unrecognized.description: This text does not look like a valid User-Agent. Please check and try again.
